meaning: vbl.(remake的过去式及过去分词)再做,重造
examples: He had all the window frames in the room remade.
'The Seven Samurai' was remade in Hollywood as 'The Magnificent Seven'.
Originally released in 1957, the film was remade as "The Magnificent Seven."
Baraka has set out to remake the world each time he has remade himself.
And he's remade Dell's product line with slicker designs and more of the laptops consumers crave.
